title: zip -r ~/vsci-userdata-backup.zip \
content:
zip -r ~/vsci-userdata-backup.zip \
"$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code - Insiders/User"

# Optional: save tasks/history
cp -R "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code - Insiders/History" ~/vsci-history-backup 2>/dev/null || true
```

**Full Removal (macOS)**
Quit Code Insiders completely (Cmd+Q). Then:
```bash
rm -rf "/Applications/Visual Studio Code - Insiders.app"
rm -rf "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code - Insiders"
rm -rf "$HOME/Library/Caches/com.microsoft.VSCodeInsiders" \
"$HOME/Library/Caches/com.microsoft.VSCodeInsiders.ShipIt"
rm -rf "$HOME/Library/Preferences/com.microsoft.VSCodeInsiders.plist"
rm -rf "$HOME/Library/Saved Application State/com.microsoft.VSCodeInsiders.savedState"
rm -rf "$HOME/Library/Logs/Code - Insiders"
rm -rf "$HOME/.vscode-insiders/extensions"
```
Download a fresh dmg from official Microsoft site, mount, and drag the app into Applications.
